fields.summary: Add user profile page with avatar upload
fields.description:
As a user, I want to view and edit my profile so that I can manage my account settings.

The page should include:
- Display name
- Email
- Avatar upload
- Password change link
fields.customfield_10429:
- User can view their current profile information
- User can upload a new avatar image
- Avatar must be resized to 256x256
- Profile changes are saved on submit
- Error message shown if upload fails
